message.content:
@startuml
actor "Sales Clerk" as SalesClerk
participant ":System" as System

== Customer Registration Process ==

activate SalesClerk
SalesClerk -> System : 1 inicia o registo do cliente
deactivate SalesClerk

activate System
System --> SalesClerk : 2 solicita dados obrigatórios(name, email, phoneNumber, vat, address)
deactivate System

activate SalesClerk
SalesClerk -> System : 3 introduz dados
deactivate SalesClerk

alt [o employee quer inserir mais endereços]
    loop [enquanto o employee quiser inserir endereços]
        activate System
        System --> SalesClerk : 4 solicita endereço
        deactivate System
        
        activate SalesClerk
        SalesClerk -> System : 5 introduz endereço
        deactivate SalesClerk
    endloop
end alt

alt [o employee insere data de nascimento]
    activate System
    System --> SalesClerk : 6 solicita data de nascimento
    deactivate System
    
    activate SalesClerk
    SalesClerk -> System : 7 introduz data de nascimento
    deactivate SalesClerk
else 
endif

alt [o employee insere género]
    activate System
    System --> SalesClerk : 8 solicita género
    deactivate System
    
    activate SalesClerk
    SalesClerk -> System : 9 introduz género
    deactivate SalesClerk
else 
endif

activate System
System --> SalesClerk : 10 apresenta os dados e informa sucesso da operação
deactivate System

@enduml
